title: Income Tax Department Launches New Integrated Payment Module on e-Filing Portal!
content:
# Income Tax Department Launches New Integrated Payment Module on e-Filing Portal!

Ek important update hai! Income Tax Department ne e-Filing portal par ek naya Integrated Payment Module launch kiya hai, jisse tax payments ab aur bhi seamless ho gaye hain.

Here's what you need to know about this major enhancement:

*   **Unified Payment Interface:** This new module allows taxpayers to conveniently make payments under both the existing Income-tax Act, 1961 (for dues up to Financial Year 2025-26) and the new Income-tax Act, 2025 (for Tax Year 2026-27 onwards), all from a single, integrated interface.
*   **Enhanced Convenience:** The primary goal of this initiative is to simplify the tax payment experience, reduce complexity, and significantly improve efficiency for taxpayers across the country.
*   **Easy Access:** Taxpayers can access this new facility directly on the e-Filing portal (www.incometax.gov.in) by navigating to the 'e-File' section and then selecting 'e-Pay Tax'.
*   **Seamless Transition:** The portal now provides clear options to select the appropriate Act (Income Tax Act, 1961 or Income Tax Act, 2025) depending on the financial or tax year for which the payment is being made.
*   **Available Payment Modes:** All standard payment options, including Net Banking, Debit Card, Pay at Bank Counter (OTC for Cash, Cheque, or Demand Draft), RTGS/NEFT, and Payment Gateway (Credit Card, Debit Card, UPI) remain available for use through this integrated module.

This is a crucial step towards modernizing tax compliance and making the e-filing process more user-friendly.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in)

*Published on: 15 June 2026*
